   "reasoning": "As a union representative, I believe that the current crisis demands immediate and substantial investment in our schools, particularly in hiring more staff to reduce class sizes and provide necessary support to students, while also providing financial aid to those at risk of dropping out. I'm wary of teacher incentives that could lead to performance pay and undermine our collective bargaining power. Transparency reports are a non-starter, as they can be used to scapegoat teachers and further erode our trust in the administration.",
